summary: Added a second grep-audit assertion to test/worktree.test.mjs that catches the `|| process.cwd()` fallback pattern in gate.mjs, closing the false-confidence gap flagged in the previous review. The new test verifies that any process.cwd() reference in gate.mjs is contained within the cmdGate function (the CLI entry point where it is safe), and would fail if it appeared outside cmdGate. All 567 tests pass.
